user_prompt: Scan the SciPy integrate package under scipy/integrate (excluding scipy/integrate/riccaticpp) to understand how current C/C++-backed ODE integrators are exposed to Python. Focus on: (1) how solve_ivp is structured and exported, (2) how _ivp submodules and tests are laid out, and (3) any patterns that a new function solve_ivp_osc in scipy.integrate._ivp._osc should follow for API, imports, and tests. Summarize key findings relevant to implementing a Phase 1 Python-only stub for solve_ivp_osc.
